title: hieracium murorum subsp. obtusoserratum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. obtusoserratum is a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) characterized by its yellow flowers and bitter leaves. The medicinal properties of Hieracium murorum subsp. obtusoserratum include its ability to act as a diuretic and to treat digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve liver function, as well as its ability to support the body's natural detoxification processes. Hieracium murorum subsp. obtusoserratum can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to support overall health and well-being.
